holdings.infoBox: TSLQ is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are Us Dollars stock at 86.34%, Trs Tesla at 59.04%, CFD on Tesla at 48.30%, CFD on Tesla at 31.54%, and CFD on Tesla at 14.48%.

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Short TSLA Daily ETF New Oct 2025 (TSLQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund provides inverse (-2x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Tesla stock. TSLQ was launched on Jul 14, 2022 and is issued by Tradr.
